title: QuickStash
description: Easily store your items! You just have to hold an item and left-click a container
body:
# QuickStash

QuickStash lets you **instantly store held items** into any container with a simple right-click—**no commands, no menus, just fast and intuitive storage**. Ideal for survival and SMP gameplay, it works right out of the box with minimal setup.

Players **can disable stash notifications or completely turn off the plugin for themselves** if they prefer.

**REPORT BUGS IN [MY DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/9mhWbFdzgu)**

**IMPORTANT:** Built for 1.21.4. Other 1.21 versions might work, but haven't been tested.

## How to use

### Survival mode
- **Left-click to stash (sneaking is required if sneak mode is enabled)**
- **Hold shift to prevent stashing**

### Creative mode
- **Shift + left-click to stash**
- **Do not hold shift to break the block**

Note: Inspired by the quick chest storing feature in Hypixel's Bedwars.
